news.summary: Australia was previously the only continent where the H5N1 bird flu strain had not yet been found.

news.title: James Burrows, legendary director of Cheers and Friends, dies aged 85
news.summary: Best-known as co-creator of sitcom Cheers, Burrows directed more than 1,000 episodes of other classics including the Big Bang Theory and Will and Grace.

news.title: Boy, 12, wins hearts after trying to check sick chicken into Ethiopian hospital
news.summary: Markos's beloved hen was not responding to any treatments - so he did the only thing he could think of.

news.title: Morocco captain Achraf Hakimi to stand trial for rape

news.title: Zimbabwe MPs pass bill to extend president's time in power
news.summary: The proposal would extend Emmerson Mnangagwa's term by two years and scrap direct presidential elections.

news.title: Do it at home too, women tell Japanese fans who cleaned World Cup stadium

news.title: Pétanque player, 68, dies after being 'hit in head with metal boule'

news.title: UK actress charged with importing meth worth almost A$300m into Australia

news.title: Asia's richest man Ambani announces what could be India's biggest share sale

news.title: In Trump's shadow, Vance becomes face of Iran deal

news.title: Moscow residents complain of black rain after largest Ukrainian attack hits oil refinery

news.title: Thirty-five killed as gunmen attack Niger's biggest airport
